name: R directed communication circle network
description: Draw a named non-negative aggregate communication matrix as a deterministic directed circle network with node size and edge width mapped to declared weights.

parameters.name: edge_width_max
parameters.description: Maximum purely visual edge width; relative ordering is unchanged.

parameters.name: vertex_weight
parameters.description: Node-size quantity; null uses total incoming plus outgoing aggregate weight.

transformations.method: caller supplied; visual edge widths normalized to displayed maximum

supports_claims: Displays the structure and relative weights of the supplied inferred aggregate network.
does_not_support: Does not prove physical communication, ligand-receptor binding, causal signaling, or sample-level reproducibility.
safer_alternatives: filtered bubble plot when the network is dense

visual_fingerprint.final_size_behavior: requires node-label and arrow visibility review
visual_fingerprint.review_note: Real PBMC3K CellChat render was opened at 180 mm and both 150/300 dpi on 2026-07-18. All nine labels, nodes, arrowheads and self-loops are visible; the full 74-edge view is intentionally dense and should be paired with chord or bubble detail. Interpretation is limited to model-inferred aggregate weights.

notes: Formal hash-bound original/final review evidence is included in the PBMC3K teaching case.
